about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a dedicated Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of experience in building high-performance applications. I love solving complex problems and creating seamless user experiences across web and mobile platforms.
about.future_desc: In the next 2 years, I aim to deepen my expertise in Cloud Native architectures and contribute to larger open-source projects in the Go and React ecosystems. I'm also exploring AI integration in modern dev workflows.
